slogan: AI-powered Smart Building Solutions, Sourcing & Lifecycle Service

home.heroTitle: AI Facility Intelligence for Buildings, Energy, Storage & Industry
home.heroSubtitle: Monitorable, compliant, serviceable facilities — sensors, AI assessment, compliance reports, alerts and long-term maintenance in one platform.
home.solutionsSubtitle: Facility-intelligence lines sold as monitoring, compliance and long-term service value — not one-time devices.
home.productsSubtitle: Service-ready devices from verified suppliers with local spare parts and support
home.servicesSubtitle: From installation to long-term lifecycle management
home.whySubtitle: Your trusted partner for smart building projects
home.whyAIDesc: AI-powered preliminary assessment helps evaluate your project requirements faster
home.whySupplyDesc: Access to China first-tier, project-grade suppliers such as Huawei Digital Power, Sungrow, LONGi, Xiaomi ecosystem, and verified OEM/ODM partners
home.whyLocalDesc: Network of certified local installers, electricians, and technicians
home.whyLifecycleDesc: Long-term support plans from 1 to 10+ years with guaranteed SLAs
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Smart Building Project?
home.ctaSubtitle: Submit your project requirements and get a preliminary assessment
home.intelligenceTitle: From connected control to local AI building brain
home.opAssessText: Collect goals, site data, drawings, photos, budget, service expectations, and missing information before any quote promise.
home.opMatchText: Match protocols, regions, certifications, intelligence levels, compatibility, spare parts, and service readiness.
home.opDeliverText: Turn the concept into design, sourcing, installation, commissioning, maintenance, and long-term upgrade paths.

intelligence.l1Text: Basic remote control, connected devices, and mobile visibility.
intelligence.l2Text: Presence, door, light, temperature, humidity, and scene automation.
intelligence.l3Text: Energy monitoring, schedules, reports, and practical saving strategies.
intelligence.l4Text: AI analysis, anomaly alerts, digital assistant, and admin-reviewed recommendations.
intelligence.l5Text: Local AI box, identity-aware permissions, and cross-system orchestration.
intelligence.l6Text: Robot-ready workflows, predictive maintenance, and semi-autonomous energy decisions.

solutions.title: Smart Building Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for every building type
solutions.recurringValueDesc: Why this stays a long-term serviced facility, not a one-time device sale.

products.title: Product Catalog
products.subtitle: B2B verified products with local service support

services.title: Service Packages
services.subtitle: Professional support for your smart building systems
services.defaultTitle: 3 years of remote assurance included with qualifying projects
services.defaultText: Delivered projects include remote diagnosis, technical consultation, handover records, and supplier warranty coordination during the agreed support period. This protects the customer without quietly bundling unpredictable field-service cost into every project.
services.onSiteNotice: On-site visits are quoted separately unless the signed proposal explicitly includes them.
services.boundaryWarrantyText: Warranty follows the manufacturer or authorized distributor terms listed in the project quotation. We coordinate claims and keep the customer informed.
services.boundaryOnSiteText: Travel, labor, third-party device issues, local network problems, accidental damage, and expansion work are quoted per visit or through a service pack.
services.boundarySparesText: For maintainable projects, we recommend a tested and traceable spare pool sized by device criticality. Emergency refurbished stock is used only with clear approval.
services.contractNote: Final coverage, response targets, exclusions, supplier warranty periods, spare-parts ownership, and local dispatch fees are defined in the signed project proposal.

basic-support.name: Included Remote Assurance
basic-support.description: Included with qualifying delivered projects: practical remote support without bundling costly site visits.

standard-3yr.name: Lifecycle Care Plan
standard-3yr.description: A renewable annual plan for customers who want proactive remote maintenance and clearer lifecycle planning.

lifecycle-5yr.name: Managed SLA Plan
lifecycle-5yr.description: A custom plan for business-critical sites that need agreed response targets, monitoring strategy, and local dispatch coordination.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: AinerWise is a B2B smart building and energy integration platform focused on delivering end-to-end solutions for hotels, villas, apartments, shops, and commercial buildings.
about.p2: We combine AI-assisted planning, China first-tier project-grade supply chain, local service partner networks, and lifecycle maintenance to deliver smart building projects that actually work in the real world.
about.approachText: Unlike traditional equipment marketplaces, AinerWise is not about selling cheap devices. We provide solution-ready devices with local integration and lifecycle support. Every project starts with understanding the site, the requirements, and the long-term goals.
about.tech1: KNX / Home Assistant / MQTT / CCTV / Access Control / HVAC automation
about.tech3: Remote maintenance and annual service plans
about.regionsText: Starting in Serbia, with planned expansion to Poland, New Zealand, and Australia. The same platform, localized for each region with local service partners, currency, and language support.

lead.title: Submit Project Requirement
lead.subtitle: Tell us about your project and get a preliminary assessment
lead.success: Your requirement has been submitted successfully! We will review and contact you soon.
lead.forgeSubtitle: Create the project by choosing one category, then let the AI intake collect missing smart-building details conversationally. No final quote is promised here.
lead.step1Label: What type of project are you planning?
lead.step1Desc: This is the only classic project-creation choice. After this, information is collected by AI-style questions.
lead.estimateWarning: AI budget output is estimate only. Final quotation requires manual review, meeting, site survey, supplier confirmation, and signed contract.
lead.submittedNotice: Submitted. Admin will review the preliminary AI estimate before any quote.

supplier.subtitle: Join AinerWise's verified supplier network
supplier.success: Your application has been submitted. We will review and contact you.

ws.aiTeamDesc: Only Agents explicitly authorized for this project may read its data or execute tasks.
ws.noAgentsAuthorized: No AI employees are authorized for this project yet.
ws.missionPlaceholder: Describe the outcome you want the AI team to help achieve...
ws.missionReviewGate: Submitting a mission does not run Agents. An administrator must review the plan and authorize project access first.
ws.estimateOnly: Estimate only. Final quote requires manual review, site survey, supplier confirmation, and signed contract.
ws.warrantyBoundary: Hardware follows the original supplier warranty unless covered by Managed Warranty or a Fast Replacement Plan. On-site visits are quoted separately.
ws.noAmc: No AMC plan on this project yet.
ws.noWarranty: No warranty record on this project yet.
ws.noTickets: No tickets yet. Open one above.

partner.registrationNote: A pending service-partner profile will be created for admin verification.
partner.bidNote: Your bid is recorded as your formal response to this request.
partner.tasksSubtitle: Admin-confirmed project work assigned to your Partner account.

partner.acceptanceHint: The customer signs on their phone. Milestone release, asset registry and the case study happen automatically after signing.
